title: Microsoft-trained and Claude Partner Network-backed AI cohorts with certification.
description: Threemates runs structured AI training cohorts for colleges, universities, enterprises, and focused learner groups with a clear promise: practical delivery readiness backed by Microsoft-aligned training, Claude Partner Network context, guided labs, live projects, and verified certification support.
heroHighlights: Live projects, labs, and mentor-led reviews

programs.title: Generative AI and LLM Engineering
programs.description: Build production-ready skills in prompt systems, retrieval pipelines, agents, evaluation, and safe deployment patterns for real business use cases.

programs.title: Azure AI Fundamentals Track
programs.description: A structured Microsoft-aligned learning path covering Azure AI services, responsible AI concepts, model usage patterns, and certification preparation.

programs.title: Claude for Applied AI Workflows
programs.description: Teach teams how to use Claude for enterprise writing, analysis, summarisation, workflow acceleration, and human-in-the-loop review systems.

programs.title: Data, MLOps, and Deployment
programs.description: Cover data pipelines, experiment tracking, deployment patterns, monitoring, and the operational foundations needed to take AI into production.

deliveryModes.title: Campus immersion
deliveryModes.description: Multi-day or semester-style delivery for colleges and universities with faculty coordination and student assessments.

deliveryModes.title: Corporate upskilling
deliveryModes.description: Role-based workshops for engineering, product, operations, marketing, and leadership teams.

deliveryModes.title: Hybrid cohorts
deliveryModes.description: Live online sessions with recordings, assignments, capstones, and mentor office hours for distributed teams.

sessionFlow.title: Foundations and orientation
sessionFlow.description: AI fundamentals, responsible usage, tool setup, and baseline assessments aligned to participant level.

sessionFlow.title: Hands-on labs
sessionFlow.description: Guided practice on prompting, model workflows, Azure AI services, Claude usage patterns, and integration exercises.

sessionFlow.title: Project build
sessionFlow.description: Participants ship a practical use case such as chatbot workflows, reporting copilots, document analysis, or internal knowledge tools.

sessionFlow.title: Certification and review
sessionFlow.description: Mock assessments, mentor feedback, and final evaluation to prepare learners for verified certification pathways.

partners.name: Microsoft
partners.label: Microsoft-trained cohort pathway
partners.description: We run Microsoft-aligned AI cohorts with Azure AI fundamentals preparation, applied Azure AI labs, certification-oriented workshops, and structured support for learners who want credible outcomes, not just exposure.

partners.name: Claude
partners.label: Claude Partner Network-backed cohort
partners.description: We deliver Claude-centered cohorts shaped by real workflow usage, reasoning support, prompt discipline, and enterprise knowledge use cases so learners understand how Claude fits practical team delivery.

certifications.title: Microsoft certification pathway
certifications.description: Preparation support for Azure AI-aligned assessment goals, revision planning, guided practice, and certification-ready confidence building.

certifications.title: Claude cohort capability certification
certifications.description: Completion-based validation for participants trained on Claude workflows, prompting discipline, reasoning tasks, and applied enterprise use cases.

certifications.title: Capstone completion certificate
certifications.description: Issued to learners who complete labs, capstone delivery, mentor review, and final cohort evaluation successfully.

mentor.name: Gokul Mahakul
mentor.description: Programs are delivered with practical build focus, real delivery examples, and mentor-led feedback loops that help participants move from concept to working implementation with certification-focused discipline.

internship.title: Gain real-world AI delivery experience
internship.description: Our internship program gives students and fresh graduates direct exposure to product workflows, mentor reviews, live project delivery, and production-minded engineering habits.

features.title: Live project experience
features.description: Work on real client and internal product problems using current AI and software tooling.

features.title: Mentorship from experts
features.description: One-to-one and cohort-based review from builders working on applied delivery problems.

features.title: Career pathway
features.description: Strong performers receive portfolio guidance, interview preparation, and role-based career direction.

features.title: Certification
features.description: Receive completion certification for project delivery, attendance, and assessment performance.

cta.title: Launch a Microsoft-trained or Claude-backed cohort for your institution or team
cta.description: We design cohort structure, certification support, labs, mentor review, and live projects around your audience, timetable, and delivery goals.
